name: Smoked Salmon Quesadillas
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Grated fresh horseradish or 1 tbsp prepared horseradish
recipeInstructions:
A signature starter from Vincent Guerithault on Camelback in Phoenix, Arizona.
Makes 4 first course servings
Additional chopped fresh dill or fresh dill sprigs
1. In a medium bowl, blend goat cheese, grated fresh horseradish, sour cream, and chopped fresh dill. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
2. Heat a heavy large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add one tortilla to the skillet and cook until brown spots appear on each side, about 1 minute per side. Transfer the tortilla to a work surface.
4. Spread one tablespoon of cheese mixture evenly over the tortilla.
5. Top with one-fourth of smoked salmon and sprinkle with additional chopped dill. Repeat with remaining tortillas, cheese mixture, smoked salmon, and dill.
6. Cut quesadillas into wedges. Garnish with dill sprigs and serve, passing the remaining cheese mixture separately.
